# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-06-21

Cloudflare rolled out Temporary Accounts on Workers, letting AI agents run `wrangler deploy --temporary` to get a live Worker without a pre-existing human-provisioned account.

Went through 20 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Temporary Cloudflare Accounts for AI agents
   Concrete platform change that removes a human-in-the-loop bottleneck for agent-driven deployments — directly applicable to agentic/MCP workflows.

2. Quoting Sean Lynch on MCP
   Sharp, specific framing for deciding when MCP overhead (vs. a plain skill/CLI wrapper) is actually justified — directly relevant to anyone building MCP...

Full brief with all 20 researched links → https://thenightlylibrarian.com/briefs/2026-06-21
